name_en: Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. This mini bag is embellished with a brand heritage logo that first appeared in the 1970s.
name_cn:
Imported original leather💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The brand's iconic GG Marmont series ingeniously incorporates double-G logo hardware and cut-chain straps, selected from soft leather to create a soft silhouette. This mini bag is embellished with a brand heritage logo that first appeared in the 1970s.
Black V-shaped Matelassé lambskin
Light gold-tone hardware
Light gold-tone hardware
Double G
Chain shoulder strap (60cm high)
Magnetic snap closure
Weight: approx. 0.35kg
Model: 841290.
Dimensions: 16.5cm (W) x 9.5cm (H) x 4.5cm (D)
Color: Black full-grain leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
